node.statement: N1.5 (j is an exact unital order-isometric Jordan iso of (A,bullet) onto the osymm-closed j(A) subset B_sa). For a,b in A, compute j(a) osymm j(b)=Ftilde(j(a) o j(b)) [def of osymm via the symmetrized Choi-Effros product applied to the AMBIENT Jordan product o, GT-hyp]=Ftilde(j(a o b)) [j is a Jordan homomorphism, j(x o y)=j(x) o j(y), GT-hyp]=j(P(a o b)) [N1.2: Ftilde j=jP applied to a o b]=j(a bullet b) [def-near-fixed-algebra: a bullet b=P(a o b)]. Hence j(a bullet b)=j(a) osymm j(b): j intertwines bullet and osymm EXACTLY. By N1.4 j(A) subset B_sa and is osymm-closed (osymm of two elements of j(A) lands in j(A) by this identity). By GT-hyp j is order-isometric (||j(x)||=||x||), unital (j(I)=I), injective (order-isometric => isometric => injective); so j is an exact unital order-isometric Jordan isomorphism of (A,bullet) onto (j(A),osymm).
